specs.summary: Covers dev_server module, JIT execution, and TypeScript/JSX transformation pipeline via tree-sitter. Directly relevant to #1090 (TypeScript type stripping), #1089 (dev-mode module transforms), and #1091 (dev server serves modules to browser).

Covers StoreManager at ~/.jet-store/{name}@{version}/ with install_package and link_package. Directly relevant to #1092 — store entries currently have no nested node_modules, breaking Node.js module resolution.
Production build pipeline using the same Bundler. Relevant to #1089 (CJS-to-ESM pre-bundling) — optimizeDeps reuses the bundler's transform infrastructure.
Store GC, hoisting, pnpm-style features. Context for #1092: pnpm's store design puts nested node_modules inside each store entry.
Workspace symlink creation. Background context — pattern reused in #1092 nested store node_modules symlinks.
Dev mode watch integration. Background: postcss-tailwind already extended dev_server/mod.rs with CSS rebuild hooks.

codebase_explored.summary: Axum-based HTTP server: routes for HMR, bundle.js, static files. Current pre_bundle_cjs_deps() uses line-based flattening. No optimizeDeps pre-bundling, no polyfill injection, no importmap injection.

AST-based TypeScript type stripping via tree-sitter. should_skip_node() handles type_annotation, type_arguments, type_parameters, interface_declaration, type_alias_declaration. Missing: export type, import type, inline type, declare, satisfies.
StoreManager: install_package extracts .tgz to ~/.jet-store/{name}@{version}/. link_package creates symlink to project node_modules. No nested node_modules for transitive deps.
JIT engine uses Transformer (tree-sitter typescript.rs) to strip types and transform JSX. Both JIT and dev server need consistent TS transform behavior.

spec_plan.covers: #1089 (CJS→ESM pre-bundling) and #1091 (Node.js builtin polyfills). Both modify dev_server/mod.rs pre-bundle pipeline.
#1090 (AST-based TypeScript type stripping). Modifies transform/typescript.rs — separate logical unit from dev server.
